## Checklist

<!-- Mark completed items with [x] -->

- [ ] My code follows project conventions (required)
- [ ] I have tested my changes (required)
- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (required)
- [ ] My PR contains only one commit (required)
- [ ] I used rebase, not merge (required)
- [ ] I added or updated tests where needed
- [ ] I updated documentation where needed
